design_philosophy: Premium modern full-screen calendar utilizing Glassmorphism and Organic Earthy trends. The interface must feel grounded, calm, and highly polished, using soft translucent layers over dynamic seasonal nature photography. Avoid sterile grays; rely on warm sand and forest greens.

layout_and_spacing.grid_structure: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 h-full p-6 sm:p-8 lg:p-12 z-10 relative
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: col-span-1 lg:col-span-3 h-full flex flex-col gap-6
layout_and_spacing.glass_panel_classes: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(26,47,36,0.08)] rounded-3xl p-6 flex flex-col

calendar_grid.day_cell: relative h-full w-full min-h-[100px] flex flex-col p-3 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 border border-transparent hover:border-white/60 hover:bg-white/50 hover:shadow-sm cursor-pointer

notes_system.style: Glassmorphism bento box in the sidebar, overflowing with subtle custom scrollbar.

holiday_integration.display: Small dot indicator on the calendar day. On click, display holiday details beautifully in the sidebar's 'Selected Date' panel.
holiday_integration.indicator_style: w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#8DB4CB] absolute bottom-3 right-3 shadow-sm

motion_and_interactions.month_transition: AnimatePresence with Framer Motion. Slide in from left/right (x: 20, opacity: 0 -> x: 0, opacity: 1) with spring physics (stiffness: 300, damping: 30).
motion_and_interactions.day_hover: Scale 1.02 on hover, slightly increase brightness of the background glass.
motion_and_interactions.modal_open: Fade in overlay, scale up modal from 0.95 to 1.0 with soft spring bounce.

images.background_strategy: The background must be absolutely positioned, taking up the full screen `w-full h-full object-cover fixed top-0 left-0 -z-10`. Crucially, add a noise overlay and a soft gradient scrim (`bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F9F8F6]/85 via-[#F9F8F6]/60 to-[#F9F8F6]/30`) on top of the image to ensure the calendar UI is readable while retaining the nature aesthetic.

technical_instructions.notes_persistence: Use a custom hook `useLocalStorage` to save and sync notes to `localStorage`. Shape: `{ [dateString]: Note[] }`.
technical_instructions.holidays_dataset: Hardcode a static array of global holidays and render a dot indicator in `day_cell` when checking `activeDate`.
technical_instructions.testing: All critical interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='calendar-next-month'`, `data-testid='note-input'`).
technical_instructions.icons: Use `lucide-react` for UI icons (ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Plus, Calendar, Tag).
